note: Asset-board contract for gamebook-if. The if-engine plays entirely without art (deterministic titled placeholders). Passages need NO manifest entry — the plate falls back to a titled placeholder. Add an 'illustration/<passageId>' slot only for passages you want illustrated. UI chrome + two thornwood-crypt plates ship as examples of the Studio-board contract.

slots.promptTemplate: An aged parchment page frame with a hand-drawn ink border, muted watercolor wash, 1980s Fighting-Fantasy gamebook plate styling, empty center.
A worn leather dice tray, top-down, hand-drawn ink linework with muted watercolor, felt interior, old gamebook plate styling.
Hand-drawn ink and muted watercolor gamebook plate: {passage_summary}

source.summary: A bramble-choked sunken stair descends to an open iron crypt gate; cold air breathes from the dark below.

slots.promptTemplate: Hand-drawn ink and muted watercolor gamebook plate: {passage_summary}

source.summary: A low vaulted crypt antechamber lit by torchlight; old gold coins glint in the grave-dust before a stone sarcophagus.
